# OrchidUI — LLM Reference

OrchidUI is a Vue 3 component library with Tailwind CSS and OrchidUI design tokens (`oc-*` prefix).

## Packages

- `@orchidui/core` — 131 components (UI primitives, forms, layout, navigation)
- `@orchidui/dashboard` — 13 components (charts, editors, specialized widgets)

## Base paths

- Index: `/mcp/orchid-core.json`, `/mcp/orchid-dashboard.json`
- Components: `/mcp/components/<Name>.detail.json`
- Examples: `/mcp/components/<Name>.<example-id>.json`

---

# @orchidui/core

## Table

Display tabular data with sorting, selection, and custom cell slots.

kind: composite · tags: table, data, list

**Use for:**
- standalone table with custom header and body control
- table with sorting and row selection
- simple data table without filter toolbar

**Understand with:** DataTable, NewTable, TableCell, TableHeader, Chip

**Related:** Chip, ExpandingTable, Icon, TableCell, TableCellContent, Toggle

- Detail: /mcp/components/Table.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Table.basic.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.cell-variants.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.expanding-table-story.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.loading.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.playground.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.sortable-columns.json
  - /mcp/components/Table.sticky-columns.json

## TableHeader

Header cell for Table, supports text or checkbox variant.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/TableHeader.detail.json

## TableCell

Body cell for Table, supports content/chip/datetime/icon/image variants.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/TableCell.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/TableCell.default.json

## TableCellContent

Two-line cell content with title and description.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/TableCellContent.detail.json

## TableLink

Wraps table cell content as a link.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/TableLink.detail.json

## ExpandingTable

Table with collapsible/expandable nested rows.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data, tree

- Detail: /mcp/components/ExpandingTable.detail.json

## ExpandingTableRow

Single row inside ExpandingTable.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/ExpandingTableRow.detail.json

## ExpandingHeaderRow

Header row for ExpandingTable.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

- Detail: /mcp/components/ExpandingHeaderRow.detail.json

## Pagination

Page navigation with prev/next and numbered buttons.

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/Pagination.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Pagination.default.json

## PrevNext

Previous or next button used inside Pagination.

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/PrevNext.detail.json

## PaginationNumber

Numbered page button used inside Pagination.

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/PaginationNumber.detail.json

## Overview

Group of metric cards showing key stats with icons.

kind: leaf · tags: stats, dashboard, metrics

**Related:** Button, OverviewItem

- Detail: /mcp/components/Overview.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Overview.default.json
  - /mcp/components/Overview.overview-group.json

## OverviewIcon

Colored icon badge inside OverviewItem.

kind: leaf · tags: icon, stats

- Detail: /mcp/components/OverviewIcon.detail.json

## OverviewItem

Single metric card with title, value, and trend indicator.

kind: leaf · tags: stats, dashboard, metrics

- Detail: /mcp/components/OverviewItem.detail.json

## CustomerCard

Display customer or beneficiary details.

kind: leaf · tags: customer, card, profile

- Detail: /mcp/components/CustomerCard.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.beneficiary.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.big-beneficiary.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.big-variant.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.default.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.empty-state.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.small-variant.json
  - /mcp/components/CustomerCard.with-actions.json

## TransferSummary

Show money transfer summary with amount, fee, and FX rate.

kind: leaf · tags: transfer, finance, summary

- Detail: /mcp/components/TransferSummary.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/TransferSummary.default.json
  - /mcp/components/TransferSummary.with-fx-data.json

## ListItem

Versatile list row for timeline, webhook, payment, and accordion layouts.

kind: leaf · tags: list, timeline, item

**Use for:**
- timeline event row
- webhook endpoint list item
- payment integration list item
- settings row with accordion expand
- general list item with chips and actions

**Understand with:** DropdownItem, Button

**Related:** Button, DropdownItem

- Detail: /mcp/components/ListItem.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.accordion.json
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.general.json
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.payment.json
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.playground.json
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.time-line.json
  - /mcp/components/ListItem.webhook.json

## ListUrl

Display a labelled URL with copy button.

kind: leaf · tags: list, url, copy

- Detail: /mcp/components/ListUrl.detail.json

## ListDetail

Label-value row in horizontal or vertical layout.

kind: leaf · tags: list, detail, label

- Detail: /mcp/components/ListDetail.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/ListDetail.default.json
  - /mcp/components/ListDetail.using-slot.json
  - /mcp/components/ListDetail.vertical.json

## InfoCard

Content card with title, loading state, and header/footer slots.

kind: leaf · tags: card, content

**Related:** Button, OverviewItem

- Detail: /mcp/components/InfoCard.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/InfoCard.default.json

## ProgressBar

Step-based linear progress bar.

kind: leaf · tags: progress, steps

- Detail: /mcp/components/ProgressBar.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/ProgressBar.default.json

## FloatContent

Floating side panel with title, description, and actions.

kind: composite · tags: panel, overlay, sidebar

**Use for:**
- side panel
- detail drawer
- edit panel
- sliding panel overlay
- customer detail side view

**Understand with:** FormBuilder, Button, ListDetail, Modal

**Related:** Button

- Detail: /mcp/components/FloatContent.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/FloatContent.default.json

## HorizontalProgressbar

Horizontal bar showing current vs max value.

kind: leaf · tags: progress, bar

- Detail: /mcp/components/HorizontalProgressbar.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/HorizontalProgressbar.default.json

## OcOnboardingListItem

Onboarding checklist row with number badge and action button.

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, checklist

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcOnboardingListItem.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcOnboardingListItem.default.json

## OcOnboardingRecap

Collapsible recap card for onboarding sections.

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, recap, summary

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcOnboardingRecap.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcOnboardingRecap.default.json
  - /mcp/components/OcOnboardingRecap.no-header.json

## OcAccountVerificationContent

Container for account verification steps.

kind: leaf · tags: verification, onboarding

**Related:** OcOnboardingRecap

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationContent.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationContent.default.json
  - /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationContent.preview.json

## OcAccountVerificationBox

Selectable verification option card.

kind: leaf · tags: verification, onboarding, option

**Related:** Chip

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationBox.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationBox.default.json
  - /mcp/components/OcAccountVerificationBox.header-slot.json

## NewTable

Table with row expansion, selection, and named column slots.

kind: composite · tags: table, data, list

**Use for:**
- table rendering inside DataTable
- standalone table with expandable rows
- table with column tooltips and copy buttons

**Understand with:** DataTable, Chip, Pagination

**Related:** Chip

- Detail: /mcp/components/NewTable.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/NewTable.default.json

## OcRowItemData

List of labelled data items with optional chip and copy button.

kind: leaf · tags: list, data, detail

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcRowItemData.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcRowItemData.default.json
  - /mcp/components/OcRowItemData.single-item.json
  - /mcp/components/OcRowItemData.with-chip.json
  - /mcp/components/OcRowItemData.with-icon.json

Collapsible section with header and body.

kind: leaf · tags: accordion, collapse, disclosure

- Detail: /mcp/components/Accordion.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Accordion.default.json

Accordion with onboarding status variant.

kind: leaf · tags: accordion, onboarding

- Detail: /mcp/components/OnboardingAccordion.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OnboardingAccordion.default.json

Selectable product option card with image.

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, option, card

**Related:** Checklist

- Detail: /mcp/components/OnboardingProductOption.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OnboardingProductOption.default.json

## Tabs

Tab bar for switching between views.

kind: composite · tags: tabs, navigation

**Use for:**
- tabbed navigation
- content switching
- multi-section view
- settings tabs

**Understand with:** SwitchTabs, PaymentTab

- Detail: /mcp/components/Tabs.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Tabs.default.json

## PaymentTab

Tab selector for payment methods.

kind: leaf · tags: tabs, payment

- Detail: /mcp/components/PaymentTab.detail.json

## Steps

Step indicator for multi-step flows.

kind: leaf · tags: steps, wizard, progress

- Detail: /mcp/components/Steps.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Steps.default.json

## Step

Single step inside Steps.

kind: leaf · tags: steps, wizard

- Detail: /mcp/components/Step.detail.json

## Variants

Group of selectable option cards.

kind: leaf · tags: variants, option, select

- Detail: /mcp/components/Variants.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Variants.default.json

## Variant

Single selectable option card with icon and label.

kind: leaf · tags: variants, option

- Detail: /mcp/components/Variant.detail.json

## SwitchTabs

Segmented control for switching between a few options.

kind: leaf · tags: tabs, toggle, switch

- Detail: /mcp/components/SwitchTabs.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/SwitchTabs.default.json

## Header

Top-level application header shell.

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout, navigation

**Related:** Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem, HeaderCenter, HeaderLeft, HeaderRight, Icon, SubHeader, TabToSelect

- Detail: /mcp/components/Header.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Header.default.json
  - /mcp/components/Header.sub-header-dropdown-element.json
  - /mcp/components/Header.sub-header-element.json

## SubHeader

Secondary header below the main header.

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout

- Detail: /mcp/components/SubHeader.detail.json

## HeaderLeft

Left slot of the Header.

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout

- Detail: /mcp/components/HeaderLeft.detail.json

## HeaderCenter

Center slot of the Header with back button support.

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout

- Detail: /mcp/components/HeaderCenter.detail.json

## HeaderRight

Right slot of the Header with action buttons.

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout

- Detail: /mcp/components/HeaderRight.detail.json

## TabToSelect

Tab bar inside Header for route switching.

kind: leaf · tags: tabs, header, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/TabToSelect.detail.json

## Checklist

Checklist step item with index, label, and completion state.

kind: leaf · tags: checklist, onboarding

- Detail: /mcp/components/Checklist.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Checklist.default.json

## PageTitle

Page title bar with back button and primary/secondary actions.

kind: leaf · tags: page, title, header

- Detail: /mcp/components/PageTitle.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/PageTitle.default.json

## PrimaryActions

Primary action buttons or dropdown inside PageTitle.

kind: leaf · tags: button, actions

- Detail: /mcp/components/PrimaryActions.detail.json

## PageTitleRight

Right action area of PageTitle.

kind: leaf · tags: page, title, actions

- Detail: /mcp/components/PageTitleRight.detail.json

## Sidebar

Main application sidebar with expandable menus.

kind: composite · tags: sidebar, navigation, layout

**Use for:**
- app navigation
- main sidebar menu
- side navigation with submenus

**Understand with:** SideBarMenu, SidebarSubmenu, SidebarFooter, SidebarFeatureBanners, AccountSetupProgress, Icon

**Related:** AccountSetupProgress, Avatar, Dropdown, DropdownItem, SidebarFeatureBanners

- Detail: /mcp/components/Sidebar.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Sidebar.all-sidebar.json
  - /mcp/components/Sidebar.default.json

## SidebarSubmenu

Expandable submenu inside Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/SidebarSubmenu.detail.json

## AccountSetup

Account setup progress widget inside Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, onboarding, progress

- Detail: /mcp/components/AccountSetup.detail.json

## SidebarHead

Header section of a Sidebar menu group.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/SidebarHead.detail.json

## SideBarMenu

Single menu item in Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation, menu

- Detail: /mcp/components/SideBarMenu.detail.json

## SidebarSubMenuItem

Child menu item inside SidebarSubmenu.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/SidebarSubMenuItem.detail.json

## SidebarFooter

Footer section of the Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, layout

- Detail: /mcp/components/SidebarFooter.detail.json

## SidebarFeatureBanners

Feature promotion banners inside Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, banner, promo

- Detail: /mcp/components/SidebarFeatureBanners.detail.json

## AccountSetupProgress

Circular progress indicator for account setup in Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, progress, onboarding

- Detail: /mcp/components/AccountSetupProgress.detail.json

## SubSidebar

Secondary sidebar for sub-navigation.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

- Detail: /mcp/components/SubSidebar.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/SubSidebar.default.json

## EmptyPage

Placeholder shown when a section has no data.

kind: leaf · tags: empty, placeholder, state

**Use for:**
- empty state placeholder
- no data yet state
- zero state with call-to-action button
- search no results state
- feature upgrade prompt

- Detail: /mcp/components/EmptyPage.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.custom-container-class.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.custom-slots.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.default.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.large-size.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.no-button.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.small-size.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.upgrade-variant.json
  - /mcp/components/EmptyPage.with-secondary-button.json

## AdditionalContent

Side panel with customer info, overview, and action buttons.

kind: leaf · tags: panel, sidebar, content

**Related:** OverviewItem

- Detail: /mcp/components/AdditionalContent.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/AdditionalContent.balance.json
  - /mcp/components/AdditionalContent.default.json
  - /mcp/components/AdditionalContent.dynamic.json

## InfoCardButton

Selectable card button with title and content.

kind: leaf · tags: card, button, select

- Detail: /mcp/components/InfoCardButton.detail.json

## Skeleton

Loading placeholder that mimics content shape.

kind: leaf · tags: loading, skeleton, placeholder

**Use for:**
- content loading placeholder
- table row loading state
- card loading skeleton
- form fields loading state
- dashboard stats loading

- Detail: /mcp/components/Skeleton.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.avatar-with-text.json
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.card.json
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.form-fields.json
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.overview-cards.json
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.table-row.json
  - /mcp/components/Skeleton.text-lines.json

- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/FeatureOverviewCard.default.json

## Input

Text input with icon, prefix, and password toggle.

kind: leaf · tags: input, text, form

**Use for:**
- text input field
- password input with toggle
- search input
- numeric or decimal input
- input with currency prefix
- input with prefix or suffix slot

- Detail: /mcp/components/Input.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Input.basic.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.numeric-input-modes.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.playground.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.states.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.with-icon.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.with-label-tooltip.json
  - /mcp/components/Input.with-prefix-suffix.json

- Examples:

## Select

Dropdown with single/multi select, filtering, and async search.

kind: leaf · tags: select, dropdown, form, filter

**Use for:**
- dropdown selection field
- single select input
- multi select with checkboxes
- async search dropdown
- grouped options select
- filter field in forms

- Detail: /mcp/components/Select.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Select.async-search.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.basic.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.filterable.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.grouped-options.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.inline-label.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.multi-select.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.playground.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.states.json
  - /mcp/components/Select.with-add-new.json

Single option item inside Select.

kind: leaf · tags: select, option, form

- Detail: /mcp/components/Option.detail.json

Labeled group of options inside Select.

kind: leaf · tags: select, group, form

- Examples:

  - /mcp/components/Calendar.with-constraints.json

## DatePicker

Date or range picker input with popover calendar.

kind: leaf · tags: datepicker, date, form

**Use for:**
- date selection field
- date range picker
- report period filter
- delivery date with min/max constraints
- date field in FormBuilder

- Detail: /mcp/components/DatePicker.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.custom-format.json
  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.date-range.json
  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.disabled-state.json

  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.single-date.json
  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.with-constraints.json
  - /mcp/components/DatePicker.with-shortcuts.json

  - /mcp/components/Slider.variant-right-input.json

- action menu trigger

## FormBuilder

Dynamic form renderer from a JSON schema.

kind: composite · tags: form, builder, dynamic, schema

**Use for:**
- dynamic form rendering
- create and edit forms
- settings form
- schema-driven form fields
- filter form inside DataTable

**Understand with:** Input, Select, TextArea, Checkbox, Toggle, PhoneInput, DatePicker, Button, Modal, FloatContent

**Related:** Button, Input

- Detail: /mcp/components/FormBuilder.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.all-field-types.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.basic.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.conditional-fields.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.custom-slot.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.playground.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.two-column-grid.json
  - /mcp/components/FormBuilder.with-validation.json

## DataTable

Data table with filtering, pagination, search, and bulk actions.

kind: composite · tags: table, data, filter, pagination, crud

**Use for:**
- resource list
- CRUD table
- data grid with search and filter
- paginated data display
- manage records with bulk actions

**Understand with:** NewTable, FormBuilder, Modal, ConfirmationModal, PageTitle, EmptyPage, Chip, Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem

**Related:** Button, Chip, Dropdown, DropdownItem, EmptyPage, Toggle

- Detail: /mcp/components/DataTable.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.basic.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.column-edit.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.cursor-pagination.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.custom-empty-state.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.loading-state.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.new-table-design.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.row-click-and-link.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.search-with-options.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.sticky-columns.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.with-custom-cells.json
  - /mcp/components/DataTable.with-filter-form.json

---

# @orchidui/dashboard

## LineChart

Time-series line chart for trend visualization.

kind: leaf · tags: chart, line, analytics, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/LineChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/LineChart.default.json

## PieChart

Pie or donut chart for proportional data.

kind: leaf · tags: chart, pie, analytics, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/PieChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/PieChart.default.json

## BarChart

Bar chart for comparing values across categories.

kind: leaf · tags: chart, bar, analytics, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/BarChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/BarChart.default.json

## BarRaceChart

Animated bar race chart for changing rankings.

kind: leaf · tags: chart, animated, analytics, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/BarRaceChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/BarRaceChart.default.json

## Card

Dashboard card container with title and content.

kind: leaf · tags: card, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/Card.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/Card.default.json

## OcOverviewPieChart

Pie chart for overview/summary widgets.

kind: leaf · tags: chart, pie, overview, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/OcOverviewPieChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OcOverviewPieChart.default.json

## OverviewMonthlyBarChart

kind: leaf · tags: chart, bar, overview, dashboard

- Detail: /mcp/components/OverviewMonthlyBarChart.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/OverviewMonthlyBarChart.default.json

## ColorPicker

kind: leaf · tags: color, picker, input

**Related:** Icon

- Detail: /mcp/components/ColorPicker.detail.json
- Examples:
  - /mcp/components/ColorPicker.default.json
  - /mcp/components/ColorPicker.gradient.json
